programmes.show_description: Phill Martin is known for his creative designs. His versatile Sentimentally Yours collections are a must for crafters. Tune in to see his exclusive designs for our 4th Birthday!
The latest collection from Tim Holtz has arrived! Pete demonstrations techniques you can try on your handmade cards, gifts, scrapbook pages and journal layouts.
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
HobbyMaker's on tour for our 4th birthday celebrations! Live from the USA, tune in to discover exclusive offers on blending brushes, cards, adhesives, sprays, and more.
HobbyMaker's on tour for our 4th birthday celebrations! Live from the USA, tune in to discover exclusive offers on stamp, dies & stencil kits - plus a limited edition treat!
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
We're getting in the mood for Spring with the Moda Garden Series Collection.
Mandy Shaw will be bringing us brand new Spring kits, perfect for this time of year!
...Fabric Bundles: Beautifully coordinated fabrics from top designers, ready to sew into stunning projects. Limited stock, so grab yours before they're gone!
Mandy Shaw will be bringing us some brilliant new quilt kits, along with beautiful new wall-hanging kits and bringing back sell out bags.
Discover reliable machines designed for everything from everyday repairs to dressmaking, quilting, and creative sewing projects.
Join AALL & Create and tune in for fabulous demos and amazing 4th birthday deals - a crafty hour awaits with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape and more.
Introducing Strawberry Tea: a special collection with Helz Cuppleditch, celebrating British spring & summer teas with cakes, scones, champagne, and iconic, beloved animal friends.
Meet the latest Golden Oldies collection: Senior Moments! Filled with charmingly funny artwork featuring grumpy grandads and groovy grannies, it's guaranteed to bring a smile.
Join AALL & Create and tune in for fabulous demos and amazing 4th birthday deals - a crafty hour awaits with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape and more.
Say goodbye to large frayed colour charts and endless swatching. These PRISM Swatch Cards are the answer to your crafting prayers, the perfect resource to add to your stash!
Named after Nigel at Craft Consortium's 7-year-old daughter, Olivia, this limited-edition collection is designed exclusively in partnership with the talented Karina Art Space.
Janice Phillips joins the HobbyMaker birthday celebrations with her latest unique collection, packed full of beautiful original artwork stamp sets.

Discover essential tools designed to help you trace, adjust, and perfect your sewing patterns with ease.
...Trousers Pattern: Adam Brooks demos the Tidebrook Trousers from Sussex Seamstress.
Michelle Clark is here with storage solutions for your sewing room needs, plus the launch of the new Laverne & Shirley Fold Away Sewing Cabinet.
Adam Brooks is back for a second hour, demonstrating how to use the Easycover Coverstitch machine for our dressmakers.
Michelle Clark is back with more Sew Stylish items for your sewing room.
Discover the calming beauty of Sanntangle - mesmerising designs that grow with every line and bring focus to your creative flow.
Create a unique and eye-catching project with this 3D Garden Pavilion die set that would make a fantastic wedding card or perfect for those who love wildlife and gardening.
Founded in 2014, Pinkfresh Studio is a creative brand dedicated to bringing fresh, modern, and versatile paper crafting products to makers around the world. Tune in for the launch!
Discover the New Beginnings collection, elegantly designed from hand-drawn artwork. Create beautiful natural designs with this range of elegant die sets.

HobbyMaker's birthday celebrations are in full swing! Join Debby for 4th birthday bundles and discover brilliant deals, crafty favourites and amazing value.
